# GrimFolio Documentation

> Official documentation for GrimFolio — a creative project planning tool for haunted house designers, escape room builders, theater directors, film makers, TTRPG dungeon masters, cosplayers, and immersive experience creators.

## What This Site Contains

This site (docs.grimfolio.com) is the full user documentation for GrimFolio. It covers every feature of the app in structured detail.

## Full Plain Text Version

A single flat Markdown file containing the complete documentation for AI consumption:
[https://docs.grimfolio.com/llms-full.txt](https://docs.grimfolio.com/llms-full.txt)

## Product Overview

GrimFolio is a three-stage creative project planning tool. Stage 1 (The Pile) is raw idea capture. Stage 2 (Build) is a spatial canvas where cards are arranged and connected. Stage 3 (Production) is a customizable widget-based command center.

Cards are the core unit — each card carries notes, status, priority, due date, tags, assignees, photos, budget lines, checklists, inspiration images, inventory assignments, and comments.

Grim is the built-in AI collaborator. She reads the full project at the start of every turn and can create cards, build checklists, generate budget lines, suggest connections, and write project summaries.

## Links

- [GrimFolio App](https://grimfolio.com)
